elements.title: Savannah Bond
elements.contents: ... that Savannah Bond (pictured) sold cosmetics before entering the adult film industry?

elements.title: Neritina pulligera
elements.contents: ... that during their migration upstream to reproduce, smaller neritid snails were observed to "hitchhike" on the bigger Neritina pulligera to save energy?

elements.title: Jordan Shanks
elements.contents: ... that Jordan Shanks's house was firebombed after he published a YouTube video about the Alameddine crime family?

elements.title: Whetwhetaksidae
elements.contents: ... that the extinct damselfly family Whetwhetaksidae is known only from wing fossils, as their bodies and heads have not survived?

elements.title: Charlie Marr
elements.contents: ... that Charlie Marr was paid by oil corporations to coach American football in Mexico?

elements.title: Middle Fork Snoqualmie River
elements.contents: ... that the Tulalip Tribes relocate "nuisance" beavers to the Middle Fork Snoqualmie River?

elements.title: Arif Havas Oegroseno
elements.contents: ... that Arif Havas Oegroseno, the Indonesian ambassador to Belgium, performed a Balinese dance at the Royal Palace of Brussels?

elements.title: 2020 Hampton County tornado
elements.contents: ... that the 2020 Hampton County tornado was the first recorded F4- or EF4-rated tornado in the South Carolina Lowcountry?

elements.title: 1235–1236 siege of Constantinople
elements.contents: ... that Tsar Asen interpreted the sudden death of his wife and child as divine punishment for breaking his alliance during the 1235–1236 siege of Constantinople?
